en.name: Reaction Time
en.desc: Test your reaction speed! Wait for the signal, then click as fast as possible. Track your best times and compete with friends.
en.howToPlay: Wait for the screen to turn green, then click anywhere as fast as you can! Your reaction time will be displayed in milliseconds. Try to beat your best score!
tips: Keep your hand ready on the mouse/click button
Focus on the screen - don't get distracted
Try to maintain consistency rather than one lucky fast time

zh.name: 反应时间
zh.desc: 测试你的反应速度！等待信号出现，然后尽快点击。记录你的最佳时间并与朋友竞争。
zh.howToPlay: 等待屏幕变绿，然后尽快点击任何位置！你的反应时间将以毫秒显示。尝试打破你的最佳记录！
tips: 保持手在鼠标/点击按钮上准备
专注于屏幕 - 不要分心
尝试保持一致性而不是一个幸运的快速时间
目标是200毫秒以下 - 那是优秀的成绩！
